summary: Iteration 10 testing completed successfully. All features verified: Certificate Management Page loads correctly, Admin Panel System tab displays Reset System button and Automated Tasks info (Fee Reminders at 9 AM, Birthday Wishes at 8 AM), /api/admin/reset-system endpoint exists, Backend scheduler is running with fee reminder and birthday wishes jobs, WhatsApp settings page loads with fee_reminder and birthday_wishes events.

issues: React hydration warning (span inside tbody) - cosmetic warning only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Certificate generation fix verified - generateCertificatePDF function at line ~102 has single QR code generation
APScheduler properly configured in server.py lines 4141-4232
Fee reminders function (lines 4004-4101) sends reminders at 7, 5, 3, 1, 0 days before due date
Birthday wishes function (lines 4103-4139) checks for birthdays matching today's MM-DD
Reset system endpoint (lines 4145-4195) properly protects current admin account
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: Certificate Management Page loads with stats cards (Pending:0, Approved:0, Issued:3). Admin Panel System tab shows Reset System Data button and Automated Tasks section showing Fee Reminders (Daily at 9:00 AM) and Birthday Wishes (Daily at 8:00 AM). WhatsApp settings page shows all events including fee_reminder and birthday_wishes with configurable templates. Backend scheduler confirmed running via logs.
